jsonLd.title: DMart is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
DMart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DMart:
DMart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DMart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
